ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN, LSTM) */,
  "framework_used" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Initial version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the input parameter belongs to */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input parameter */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Value of the input parameter */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of the input parameter (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output value */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the output value belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output value */,
  "output_value" TEXT /* Value of the output value */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of the output value (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Detailed list of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the training data belongs to */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model after training */,
  "training_loss" REAL /* Loss of the model after training */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used for training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_trainings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the prediction belongs to */,
  "input_values" TEXT /* Input values used to make the prediction */,
  "predicted_output" TEXT /* Predicted output value */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, train, predict) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the team is working on */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_teams_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES model_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the model */,
  "can_train" INTEGER /* Whether the user can train the model */,
  "can_predict" INTEGER /* Whether the user can make predictions using the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_notes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
